title: Salivary DNA Extraction
author: Clemens Scherzer
materials: Carefully pipette off the supernatant and discard it.

steps.title: Mix sample in the DNA Genotek...
steps.instruction: Mix sample in the DNA Genotek kit by inversion and gentle shaking.

steps.title: Weigh sample in original tube and subtract 6
steps.instruction: Weigh sample in original tube and subtract 6.81g to estimate saliva volume provided – amount of saliva collected is directly proportional to the amount of DNA recovered.

steps.title: Incubate the sample at 50 °C,...
steps.instruction: Incubate the sample at 50 °C, air incubator for minimum 02:00:00 . Alternatively: Can incubate in 50 °C, water bath Overnight the night before extraction or minimum 01:00:00 .

steps.title: Transfer the entire sample to a...
steps.instruction: Transfer the entire sample to a 15mL falcon tube by pouring.

steps.title: Note volume of sample
steps.instruction: Note volume of sample. Volume of Sample:

steps.title: Add 1/25th volume of PT-L2P and...
steps.instruction: Add 1/25th volume of PT-L2P and mix by vortexing for a few seconds.

steps.title: Incubate On ice for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Incubate On ice for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge 4500 rpm, Room temperature, 10 minutes, max speed
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 4500 rpm, Room temperature, 10 minutes, max speed .

steps.title: Carefully transfer most of the clear...
steps.instruction: Carefully transfer most of the clear supernatant with a pipette to a fresh 50mL centrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.2x volume of Room temperature 100% ethanol to the clear supernatant. Mix gently by inversion 10x.

steps.title: Let the sample stand at Room...
steps.instruction: Let the sample stand at Room temperature for 00:10:00 to allow DNA to fully precipitate.

steps.title: Centrifuge 4500 rpm, Room temperature, 10 minutes, max speed
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 4500 rpm, Room temperature, 10 minutes, max speed .

steps.title: Add 1 mL, 70% ethanol to...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL, 70% ethanol to the tube without disturbing the pellet.

steps.title: Let stand at Room temperature for...
steps.instruction: Let stand at Room temperature for 00:01:00 , then gently swirl and completely remove the ethanol without disturbing the pellet.

steps.title: Rehydrate the DNA by adding 300 µL, TE solution
steps.instruction: Rehydrate the DNA by adding 300 µL, TE solution .

steps.title: Let stand at Room temperature for...
steps.instruction: Let stand at Room temperature for 00:05:00 to allow remaining ethanol to evaporate.

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 01:00:00 or 4 °C Overnight
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 01:00:00 or 4 °C Overnight .

steps.title: Mix by pipetting up and down...
steps.instruction: Mix by pipetting up and down 10x using wide-bore pipette tips.

steps.title: Mix by pipetting up and down...
steps.instruction: Mix by pipetting up and down 10x using wide-bore pipette tips, then transfer the rehydrated DNA to 2 fresh 1.5mL low-retention microcentrifuge tubes (150uL each) for storage at -80 °C . Aliquots are labeled “DNA-SAL-01” and “DNA-SAL-02”.

steps.title: Scan DNA samples into the Freezerworks...
steps.instruction: Scan DNA samples into the Freezerworks Inventory Program and position in corresponding freezer.

steps.title: Separate and store each DNA aliquot...
steps.instruction: Separate and store each DNA aliquot (DNA-01 and DNA-02 or DNA-SAL-01 and DNA-SAL-02) in two different local -80°C freezers.
